error_signature: records not loaded dynamically based on order_id
title: Supabase records not loading dynamically with order_id filter
symptom: When attempting to filter records based on 'order_id', only records for the last order ID are loaded instead of dynamically updating based on the variable.
not_this_if: Records load correctly for other filters
root_cause: The filtering mechanism in the Supabase plugin may not be correctly set up to respond to dynamic changes in the 'order_id' variable, leading to static results based on the last order ID instead of the current context.
fix_steps: Ensure a fetch collection action is added when loading the order.
Verify that the filter is correctly configured to use the dynamic 'order_id' variable.
agent_instruction: Add a fetch collection action to load the order and ensure the filter uses the dynamic 'order_id'.
